isi.lyrics:
Lyric Straighters - Hate me (feat. TOA and ankimo of Daylotus)

Romanization

You're just dead to me
I'm the voice inside your head, you see
So pull the trigger
And hate me if it makes you feel better

nan neomu deoreowojyeosseo

Hate me
yeah

I'm the voice inside your head, you see
So pull the trigger, bitch
hate me if you want

neon neomu kkaekkeuthaejyeosseo

jinagani teoreoneomgil jageun janilppun

isi.lyrics:

Romanization

Trust me
I’ll never fall in love with you again
Curse me
Things we all meant got lost along the way
Maybe
We just planned to break and fade again
Hate me
I don’t wanna fall in love again

achime nun tteo boni life is so amazing
wae jinjak noji mothaesseulkka huryeonhae ijen
I made a few mistakes
I wasn’t true to myself

tto bambokhago sipji ana
“Where you wanna go outside tonight?”
“You look a little tired, wanna chill, alright?”
moreun cheok nunchiman bogoinneun neol
deo bogo sipji ana

Don’t come around and drive me crazy
You said there was no problem
munjereul ttajil baen
My answer is goodbye

Was I nice to you?
Looking back, it doesn’t matter now
Was I nice to you?
I don’t know, but I hope we’re okay apart
